tool_input.command: blocks add --siblingId ABC123 --position after --markdown "- [ ] Купить молоко #задача/15м"
blocks add --siblingId ABC123 --position after --json '{"type":"text","markdown":"- [ ] Купить молоко #задача/15м","indentationLevel":1}'

name: literal --markdown substring inside a --json payload → allow (boundary)

tool_input.command: blocks update --id ABC123 --json '{"markdown":"писать через --markdown при записи нельзя"}'

name: craft_read with --markdown → allow (not a write tool)
tasks add via bare --markdown → deny (any write --markdown flag without --json)
--markdown flag at end of command → deny
